# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent service mesh security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-controlplane
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      statusPort: 15020
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        privileged: false
        enableCoreDump: false
        holdApplicationUntilProxyStarts: true
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: envoy-admin-gateway
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  ports:
  - port: 15000
    targetPort: 15000
    protocol: TCP
    name: admin
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals:
        - cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account
        - cluster.local/ns/monitoring/sa/prometheus
    to:
    - operation:
        ports:
        - "15000"
        paths:
        - "/config_dump"
        - "/stats"
        - "/stats/prometheus"
        - "/clusters"
        - "/server_info"
        - "/ready"
        methods:
        - "GET"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
  portLevelMtls:
    15000:
      mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: default-sidecar-config
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  egress:
  - hosts:
    - "./*"
  ingress:
  - port:
      number: 15000
      protocol: HTTP
      name: admin
    defaultEndpoint: 127.0.0.1:15000
    bind: 127.0.0.1
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-reader
  namespace: istio-system
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-reader
  namespace: istio-system
rules:
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods", "pods/log"]
  verbs: ["get", "list"]
- apiGroups: [""]
  resources: ["pods/portforward"]
  verbs: ["create"]
---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: RoleBinding
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-reader-binding
  namespace: istio-system
subjects:
- kind: ServiceAccount
  name: envoy-admin-reader
  namespace: istio-system
roleRef:
  kind: Role
  name: envoy-admin-reader
  apiGroup: rbac.authorization.k8s.io
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-network-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      istio: ingressgateway
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: monitoring
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          name: istio-system
    ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 15000
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access-instructions
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  access-guide.txt: |
    Secure Envoy Admin Access Guide:
    
    1. Use kubectl port-forward with proper RBAC:
       kubectl port-forward -n <namespace> <pod-name> 15000:15000
    
    2. Access endpoints locally:
       curl http://localhost:15000/config_dump
       curl http://localhost:15000/stats
       curl http://localhost:15000/clusters
    
    3. For automated monitoring, use service account:
       envoy-admin-reader in istio-system namespace
    
    4. All access is logged and audited
    5. mTLS is enforced for all admin port connections
    6. Admin interface bound to localhost only
    7. Network policies restrict access to authorized namespaces
